CustomField.description: Formula that holds the logic of which account is eligible for the nightly KYC batch
CustomField.formula: IF( AND( not(No_Touch_Account__c), not(isblank(text(Stage__c))), OR( AND( MAX_Probability__c >= 0.25, isblank(Primary_Screening_Case__c) ), AND( text(Status__c) = 'Active', OR( isblank(Primary_Screening_Case__c), LOWER(Primary_Screening_Case__r.tr_wc1__Screened_Name__c) <> LOWER(Billing_Name__c) ) ), AND( text(Status__c) = 'Expired', Primary_Screening_Case__r.tr_wc1__Monitoring_Enabled__c = true ) ) ), TRUE, FALSE )
CustomField.label: KYC Nightly Screen formula
